intended_use: Sprite pipeline atlas and animation preview stress testing
Tactics, card battler, and monster-collector template demo candidates
notes: Do not vendor the Unity project directly into URPG release content.
Use tools/assets/ingest_duelyst_animations.py against a local checkout to generate normalized sprite_atlas metadata.
Generated outputs remain normalized_not_promoted until attribution, package size, and release-promotion manifests are approved.
